Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|12=draft|12=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|12=draft|12=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = Square Kofun |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|12=draft|12=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|12=draft|12=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|12=draft|12=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|12=draft|12=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|12=draft|12=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|12=draft|12=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|12=draft|12=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft|12=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|12=draft|12=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Fukuyama City official website * [https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - {{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |name = Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, funkyu-2.jpg|280px]]
Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = Square Kofun |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Fukuyama City official website * [https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Shinichi Town Tourism Association {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofuns in Hiroshima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fukuyama]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[en:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[ja:大佐山白塚古墳]]

revision.comment: 32 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:大佐山白塚古墳 up to rev 104540395
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 大佐山白塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, funkyu-2.jpg|280px]]
墳丘・石室開口部 |別名 = 大佐山1号墳 |所属 = 大佐山古墳群 |所在地 = [[広島県]][[福山市]][[新市町]]大字戸手 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 33|緯度秒 = 45.00 |経度度 =133|経度分 = 17|経度秒 = 44.68 |ISO = JP-34 |形状 = [[方墳]]（[[円墳]]?） |規模 = 一辺12m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]前半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 広島県指定史跡「大佐山白塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Hiroshima |アイコン = 方墳 |ラベル = 大佐山
白塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|墳頂からの眺望}}{{small|眼下に大佐山古墳群が分布する。}}]] '''大佐山白塚古墳'''（おおさやましらつかこふん、大佐山1号墳）は、[[広島県]][[福山市]][[新市町]]戸手にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]（または[[円墳]]）。大佐山古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。広島県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == 広島県東部、[[神辺平野]]北縁の大佐山（標高188メートル）の山頂付近において、平野を一望する南斜面に築造された古墳である。一帯に分布する大佐山古墳群のうちでは最大規模になる。発掘調査は実施されていない。 墳形は方形（または円形）で、一辺12メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘正面の裾部には貼石状石列が、背後に周溝が認められる{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南方向に開口する。[[花崗岩]]の切石を使用した整美な石室で、玄室・羨道の間には石柱を立てる。副葬品は詳らかでない。築造時期は[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]前半（または7世紀中葉[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html 大佐山白塚古墳]（福山市ホームページ）。）頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[1948年]]（[[昭和]]23年）に広島県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[江戸時代]]、『[[西備名区]]』に記述{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 * [[1948年]]（[[昭和]]23年）9月17日、広島県指定史跡に指定。 * [[1949年]]（昭和24年）8月2日、史跡指定名称の変更。 * [[1979年]]（昭和54年）、測量調査{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 == 埋葬施設 == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石室俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室展開図}}]] 埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南方向に開口する。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：7.8メートル * 玄室：長さ3.75-3.88メートル、幅1.9メートル、高さ2.2メートル * 羨道：長さ約4メートル 石室は[[花崗岩]]の切石を使用した整美なもので、玄室と羨道の境には石柱を立ててその上に鴨居状の石を架けて区別する。玄室と羨道の規模を揃えようとした意図が認められるため、羨道部を前室、玄室部を後室とする複室構造の石室と解する説もある{{Sfn|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}。同様の構造をもつ石室としては、[[大坊古墳 (福山市)|大坊古墳]]（福山市神辺町西中条）・狼塚2号古墳（福山市駅家町法成寺）がある。 石室の奥壁には一枚石を立て、側壁は玄室・羨道とも2段積みである{{Sfn|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}。「白塚」という名称のいうように石室内面には漆喰を塗布したと考えられるが、現在では明瞭でない。石室内部には小礫が散在しており、床面は礫敷の可能性が高いとされる{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1-2.jpg|玄室（奥壁方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2-2.jpg|玄室（開口部方向）
{{small|左右に石柱。}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2-2.jpg|羨道（開口部方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1-2.jpg|羨道（玄室方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance-2.jpg|開口部 == 文化財 == === 広島県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 大佐山白塚古墳 - 1948年（昭和23年）9月17日指定、1949年（昭和24年）8月2日に指定名称変更[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html 大佐山白塚古墳]（広島県教育委員会「ホットライン教育ひろしま」）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 史跡説明板（福山市教育委員会・新市町商工会青年部、1997年設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=大佐山白塚古墳|title=広島県の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]35|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|広島県の地名|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=小都隆|year=1989|chapter=白塚古墳 > 大佐山白塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=大佐山白塚古墳|title=新市町史|volume=資料編I|publisher=広島県芦品郡新市町|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}}} == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html 大佐山白塚古墳] - 広島県教育委員会「ホットライン教育ひろしま」 * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html 大佐山白塚古墳] - 福山市ホームページ *[https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 大佐山白塚古墳] - 新市町観光協会 {{デフォルトソート:おおさやましらつかこふん}} [[category:広島県の古墳]] [[category:福山市の歴史]] [[category:方墳]] [[category:広島県指定史跡]]

{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 大佐山白塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, funkyu-2.jpg|280px]]
墳丘・石室開口部 |別名 = 大佐山1号墳 |所属 = 大佐山古墳群 |所在地 = [[広島県]][[福山市]][[新市町]]大字戸手 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 33|緯度秒 = 45.00 |経度度 =133|経度分 = 17|経度秒 = 44.68 |ISO = JP-34 |形状 = [[方墳]]（[[円墳]]?） |規模 = 一辺12m |埋葬施設 = 両袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]前半 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 広島県指定史跡「大佐山白塚古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Hiroshima |アイコン = 方墳 |ラベル = 大佐山
白塚古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|墳頂からの眺望}}{{small|眼下に大佐山古墳群が分布する。}}]] '''大佐山白塚古墳'''（おおさやましらつかこふん、大佐山1号墳）は、[[広島県]][[福山市]][[新市町]]戸手にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]（または[[円墳]]）。大佐山古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。広島県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == 広島県東部、[[神辺平野]]北縁の大佐山（標高188メートル）の山頂付近において、平野を一望する南斜面に築造された古墳である。一帯に分布する大佐山古墳群のうちでは最大規模になる。発掘調査は実施されていない。 墳形は方形（または円形）で、一辺12メートルを測る史跡説明板。。墳丘正面の裾部には貼石状石列が、背後に周溝が認められる{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。埋葬施設は両袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、南方向に開口する。[[花崗岩]]の切石を使用した整美な石室で、玄室・羨道の間には石柱を立てる。副葬品は詳らかでない。築造時期は[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]前半（または7世紀中葉[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html 大佐山白塚古墳]（福山市ホームページ）。）頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[1948年]]（[[昭和]]23年）に広島県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[江戸時代]]、『[[西備名区]]』に記述{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 * [[1948年]]（[[昭和]]23年）9月17日、広島県指定史跡に指定。 * [[1949年]]（昭和24年）8月2日、史跡指定名称の変更。 * [[1979年]]（昭和54年）、測量調査{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 == 埋葬施設 == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石室俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石室展開図}}]] 埋葬施設としては両袖式[[横穴式石室]]が構築されており、南方向に開口する。石室の規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：7.8メートル * 玄室：長さ3.75-3.88メートル、幅1.9メートル、高さ2.2メートル * 羨道：長さ約4メートル 石室は[[花崗岩]]の切石を使用した整美なもので、玄室と羨道の境には石柱を立ててその上に鴨居状の石を架けて区別する。玄室と羨道の規模を揃えようとした意図が認められるため、羨道部を前室、玄室部を後室とする複室構造の石室と解する説もある{{Sfn|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}。同様の構造をもつ石室としては、[[大坊古墳 (福山市)|大坊古墳]]（福山市神辺町西中条）・狼塚2号古墳（福山市駅家町法成寺）がある。 石室の奥壁には一枚石を立て、側壁は玄室・羨道とも2段積みである{{Sfn|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}。「白塚」という名称のいうように石室内面には漆喰を塗布したと考えられるが、現在では明瞭でない。石室内部には小礫が散在しており、床面は礫敷の可能性が高いとされる{{Sfn|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}。 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1-2.jpg|玄室（奥壁方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2-2.jpg|玄室（開口部方向）
{{small|左右に石柱。}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2-2.jpg|羨道（開口部方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1-2.jpg|羨道（玄室方向） Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance-2.jpg|開口部 == 文化財 == === 広島県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 大佐山白塚古墳 - 1948年（昭和23年）9月17日指定、1949年（昭和24年）8月2日に指定名称変更[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html 大佐山白塚古墳]（広島県教育委員会「ホットライン教育ひろしま」）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 史跡説明板（福山市教育委員会・新市町商工会青年部、1997年設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=大佐山白塚古墳|title=広島県の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]35|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|広島県の地名|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=小都隆|year=1989|chapter=白塚古墳 > 大佐山白塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|日本古墳大辞典|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=大佐山白塚古墳|title=新市町史|volume=資料編I|publisher=広島県芦品郡新市町|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|新市町史 資料編I|2002}}}} == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html 大佐山白塚古墳] - 広島県教育委員会「ホットライン教育ひろしま」 * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html 大佐山白塚古墳] - 福山市ホームページ *[https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 大佐山白塚古墳] - 新市町観光協会 {{デフォルトソート:おおさやましらつかこふん}} [[category:広島県の古墳]] [[category:福山市の歴史]] [[category:方墳]] [[category:広島県指定史跡]]

Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = Square Kofun |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Fukuyama City official website * [https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Shinichi Town Tourism Association {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{citation needed|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofuns in Hiroshima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fukuyama]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[en:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[ja:大佐山白塚古墳]] {{translated page|ja|大佐山白塚古墳|version=104540395|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=draft}} |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft}} |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft}} |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Fukuyama City official website * [https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft}} |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education * [https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Fukuyama City official website * [https://www.k-shinichi.com/spot?id=18 Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] - Shinichi Town Tourism Association {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大佐山白塚古墳|version=104540395|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Kofuns in Hiroshima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fukuyama]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]][[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[en:Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun]] [[ja:大佐山白塚古墳]]

Mound and stone chamber entrance |Other name = Osayama No. 1 Kofun | part_of = Osayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuyama|qq=}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshima Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinichi|qq=}} Oaza Tote |coordinatesree = 34|coordinatesute = 33|coordinatesond = 45.00 |coordinatesree = 133|coordinatesute = 17|coordinatesond = 44.68 |omitted = JP-34 |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} (or {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}}) |area = 12 meters per side |burial = Double-sleeved {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods Found = |Associated Mounds = |built = Early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/7th century|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |Historic Site = Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site: "Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun" |designation1 = |notes = |map = Japan Hiroshima |type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |map_dot_label = Osayama
Shiratsuka Kofun |map_dot_label = Top }} [[File:Osayama Kofun Group, gaikan.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|View from the mound}}{{small|The Osayama Kofun Cluster is spread out below.}]]] '''Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun''' (大佐山白塚古墳, also known as Osayama No. 1 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuyama|qq=}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshima Prefecture|qq=}}, in the {{ill|Shinichi|ja|新市町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinichi|qq=}} Tote area. The mound is square-shaped (or round) and is part of the Osayama Kofun Cluster. It has been Historic Site1 as a historical site by Hiroshima Prefecture. == Overview == The Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun is located near the summit of Osayama, which stands at an elevation of 188 meters, on the southern slope offering a panoramic view of the {{ill|Kannabe Plain|ja|神辺平野|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannabe Plain|qq=}} to the north. It is the largest kofun in the surrounding Osayama Kofun Cluster. The site has not undergone excavation. The Kofun is square-shaped (or possibly round), measuring 12 meters per sideHistorical site intypeation board.. The base of the mound's front features a stone arrangement resembling paving and a surrounding trench at the rear{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} that opens to the south. The chamber is finely constructed with cut {{ill|granite|ja|花崗岩|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/granite|qq=}}, and a stone pillar is placed between the main chamber (玄室) and the antechamber (羨道). Details about burial goods remain unclear. The construction period is estimated to be the early {{ill|7th century|ja|7世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/7th century|qq=}} (or mid-7th century[https://www.city.fukuyama.hiroshima.jp/soshiki/bunka/64216.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Fukuyama City official website).). The site was Historic Site1 a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site in [[1948]] (Showa 23). == History == * Edo period: Mentioned in {{ill|Seibi Meiku|ja|西備名区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seibi Meiku|qq=}}{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. * [[1948]] (Showa 23), September 17: Designated as a Hiroshima Prefecture Historic Site. * [[1949]] (Showa 24), August 2: Renaming of the Historic Site1 historical site. * [[1979]] (Showa 54): Survey conducted{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-B-2.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Top-down view of the stone chamber}]]] [[File:Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, 3D-N-2.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Expanded view of the stone chamber}]]] The burial facility is a double-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} that opens southward. The area of the chamber are as follows: * Total length: 7.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.75–3.88 meters, width 1.9 meters, height 2.2 meters * Antechamber: Length approximately 4 meters The chamber features finely crafted granite blocks, with a stone pillar and lintel stone marking the transition between the antechamber and main chamber. It is considered a two-room structure, with the antechamber serving as a front room and the main chamber as a rear room{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. Similar chambers are found in the {{ill|Ōbō Kofun|ja|大坊古墳 (福山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbō Kofun|qq=}} and Wolf Mound No. 2 (狼塚2号古墳) in Fukuyama. The rear wall is a single large slab, and the side walls are constructed in two tiers{{Sfn|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}. The chamber's walls were likely coated with plaster, as suggested by the name "Shiratsuka" ("White Mound"), though this is not evident today. The floor appears to have been paved with gravel, supported by scattered small pebbles{{Sfn|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}. Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (view toward rear wall) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (view toward antechamber)
{{small|Stone pillars on both sides.}} Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-2.jpg|Antechamber (view toward entrance) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, sendou-1.jpg|Antechamber (view toward main chamber) Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|Entrance == Historic Site == === Hiroshima Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site: *** Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun - Designated on September 17, 1948 (Showa 23); renamed on August 2, 1949 (Showa 24)[https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] (Hiroshima Prefecture Board of Education website).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Sources == * Historical site intypeation board (Fukuyama City Board of Education and Shinichi Town Chamber of Commerce Youth Group, installed in 1997) * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=1982|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Hiroshima Prefecture names|series={{ill|Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|ja|日本歴史地名大系|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|qq=}} 35|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heibonsha|qq=}}|isbn=4582490352|ref={{Harvid|Hiroshima Prefecture names|1982}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=Takahiro Koto|year=1989|chapter=Shiratsuka Kofun > Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title={{ill|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|13=User:Immanuelle/Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=}}|publisher={{ill|Tōkyōdō Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkyōdō Shuppan|qq=}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Japanese Kofuns Encyclopedia|1989}}}} * {{Cite book|Japanese|editor=|author=|year=2002|chapter=Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|title=Shinichi Town History|volume=Materials Volume I|publisher=Shinichi Town, Ashina District, Hiroshima Prefecture|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Shinichi Town History Materials Volume I|2002}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun}} * [https://www.pref.hiroshima.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/bunkazai-data-206120450.html Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun] -
